creator: staticwizard@hotmail.com
text:
Encountered a compile problem while including the headers of libtorrent 1.10_[3-5].
I've tracked it down to a single header still including the endian.hpp file.

The github issue is at https://github.com/arvidn/libtorrent/pull/3593/files.
Maybe the maintainer can include the removal of the line together with the Boost 1.70 patch for libtorrent 1.10? 

Thanks.
